_meta.schemaNote: Each reciter has either an `everyayah` source (verse-level audio, slug-based) or an `mp3quran` source (surah-level audio, server-base URL). The `audioGranularity` field is `ayah` or `surah` accordingly. UI must render different affordances: ayah-level files are typically a few hundred KB and play exactly the verse; surah-level files are multi-MB and play from the start of the surah.

everyayah.label: EveryAyah.com
everyayah.license: Each reciter's audio is hosted by EveryAyah under the original recording's license. EveryAyah aggregates publicly available recitations; consult https://everyayah.com/recitations_ayat.html for per-reciter terms. Attribution to the reciter and EveryAyah is required when redistributing.
everyayah.padding: 3-digit zero-padded surah followed immediately by 3-digit zero-padded ayah (e.g. Q 1:1 -> 001001.mp3)

mp3quran.label: MP3Quran.net
mp3quran.license: Audio aggregated by MP3Quran.net under each reciter's original recording terms. Attribution required when redistributing. Free for personal use; commercial use requires per-reciter consultation.
mp3quran.padding: 3-digit zero-padded surah only (one MP3 per surah; no per-verse files exist on this CDN).
mp3quran.limitationNote: Surah-level audio only. Clicking play loads a multi-MB file and plays from the start of the surah; the user must scrub to find a specific verse. UI must surface this limitation in the play button's tooltip.

_meta.verifiedNote: Every entry below has its server URL probed via HTTP HEAD against surahs 1, 2, 3, 5 (the four surahs covering the 8 curated verses) and returned HTTP 200.

husary-qalun.name: Mahmoud Khalil al-Husary (Qālūn)
husary-qalun.note: Same reciter as the EveryAyah Hafs entry; this is his Qālūn ʿan Nāfiʿ recording from MP3Quran. Surah-level audio only — clicking play loads the entire surah.
